commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: As for these things which you behold, the days will come, in which there shall not be left one stone upon another, that shall not be thrown down. It was by the divine dispensation of Providence that this city and temple were destroyed; for had the ancient rites and sacrifices continued, some that were but weak in their faith, might have been filled with astonishment at the sight of these different modes of worship, existing at the same time, and thus have been lead astray from the path of truth.
